betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Electrolyzer§f:
The Electrolyzer (nuclearcraft:electrolyzer) is a single-block machine that uses electrical energy to decompose fluids into their elemental components. It is the primary source of hydrogen, oxygen, and deuterium in NC.

§6Slot Layout (ElectrolyzerRecipes.java:12)§f:
0 item input → 1 fluid input → 0 item output → 4 fluid outputs. The Electrolyzer takes one fluid and produces up to four separate output fluids.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:91)§f:
Pattern "PGP / SCS / PMP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateAdvanced, G = ingotGraphite, S = solenoidCopper, C = chassis, M = motor. Yields 1 Electrolyzer.

§6What It Does (ElectrolyzerRecipes.java:21-32)§f:
- §bWater → Hydrogen + Oxygen§f: half-bucket water → quarter-bucket H₂ + eighth-bucket O₂
- §bLE Water → Hydrogen + Deuterium + Oxygen§f: 0.375× H₂ + 0.125× D + 0.25× O₂
- §bHE Water → Hydrogen + Deuterium + Oxygen§f: 0.25× H₂ + 0.25× D + 0.25× O₂
- §bHeavy Water → Deuterium + Oxygen§f: half-bucket D + quarter-bucket O₂
- §bHydrofluoric Acid → Hydrogen + Fluorine§f: quarter-bucket each
- §bNaOH → Sodium + Water + Oxygen§f: 0.5× Na + 0.25× water + 0.125× O₂
- §bKOH → Potassium + Water + Oxygen§f: same ratios as NaOH
- §bAlumina → Aluminum + Oxygen§f: 1× Al + 0.75× O₂

§6Direct Descendants of Electrolyzer (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 6 items used in the Electrolyzer recipe:
- plateAdvanced (nuclearcraft:part:1)
- ingotGraphite (NC, HBM)
- solenoidCopper (nuclearcraft:part:4)
- chassis (nuclearcraft:part:10)
- motor (nuclearcraft:part:8)

§6Multiblock Form (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:151-153)§f:
NC also provides a multiblock Electrolyzer Controller for high-throughput electrolysis:
- Pattern "BSB / HCH / BSB" — Bronze + Sintered Steel + Hard Carbon + Chassis
- 2× Electrolyzer Cathode Terminal — pattern "BSB / RCR / BSB" with dustRedstone center
- 2× Electrolyzer Anode Terminal — pattern "BSB / LCL / BSB" with Lapis center

The multiblock version is more RF-efficient and processes larger fluid batches.

§6Role in NC Chemistry Chain§f:
The Electrolyzer is the only source of:
- §bHydrogen§f — used in Chemical Reactor (ammonia synthesis, boric acid production)
- §bDeuterium§f — used in fusion fuel (Li-6 D), Heavy Water, and Salt Reactor coolant
- §bOxygen§f — used in Combustion reactions and as reactor oxidant
- §bFluorine§f — used in Chemical Reactor (LiF, BeF₂, FLiBe synthesis)

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30021 (Alloy Furnace) — the basic NC unlock.

§eTip§f: Build at least 2 Electrolyzers. Deuterium production is rate-limited by Heavy Water availability, and you'll need it for fusion fuel and Salt Reactor coolants.

§eTip§f: Use the multiblock Electrolyzer for production-scale hydrogen generation. It's significantly more RF-efficient than stacking single-block Electrolyzers.

§cWarning§f: Hydrogen gas is explosive. Always pipe it through reinforced fluid conduits and store in dedicated tanks, not open pools.
